calendar.matters:
Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jul-10-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This casuse came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo, CSR: Lavon Granger.
Appearances:
Matthew Hindman, Esq. for Plaintiff Crest Royal Corp., present by General Manager, Susan Mars was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant, John Novak.
Principal/Damages of $71,475.00
Attorney's fees of $4,251.75
Costs of $738.00
Interest of $1,896.56
Does 1-20 are dismissed.
Judgment signed in open court.

Default Prove-Up In Scd 219 At 09:00 A.M. On May 15, 2003
Off Calendar May-20-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This casuse came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S, Ravinantapricha/P. Dias, CSR: Robert Balian.
No appearances. This matter is ordered off calendar, per counsel's request.
